## Overview

The R package disaggR is an implementation of the French Quarterly
National Accounts method for temporal disaggregation of time series.
[`twoStepsBenchmark()`](https://inseefr.github.io/disaggR/reference/twoStepsBenchmark.md)
and
[`threeRuleSmooth()`](https://inseefr.github.io/disaggR/reference/threeRuleSmooth.md)
bend a time series with another one of a lower frequency.

## Installation

You can install the **stable** version from
[CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=disaggR).

``` r

install.packages("disaggR")
```

You can install the **development** version from
[Github](https://github.com/InseeFr/disaggR).

``` r

# install.packages("devtools")
install_github("InseeFr/disaggR")
```

## Usage

``` r

library(disaggR)

benchmark <- twoStepsBenchmark(hfserie = turnover,
                               lfserie = construction,
                               include.differenciation = TRUE)
as.ts(benchmark)
coef(benchmark)
summary(benchmark)
plot(benchmark)
plot(in_sample(benchmark))
```

![](reference/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-4-1.png)![](reference/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-4-2.png)

``` r

plot(in_disaggr(benchmark,type="changes"),
     start=c(2015,1),end=c(2020,12))
plot(in_disaggr(benchmark,type="contributions"),
     start=c(2015,1),end=c(2020,12))
```

![](reference/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-5-1.png)![](reference/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-5-2.png)

``` r

plot(in_scatter(benchmark))

new_benchmark <- twoStepsBenchmark(hfserie = turnover,
                                   lfserie = construction,
                                   include.differenciation = FALSE)
plot(in_revisions(new_benchmark,
                  benchmark),start = c(2010,1))
```

![](reference/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-6-1.png)![](reference/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-6-2.png)

## Shiny app

You can also use the shiny application **reView**, to easily chose the
best parameters for your benchmark.

``` r

reView(benchmark)
```

![shinyscreen](reference/figures/shiny-screen.jpg)

# Package index

## All functions

- [`bflSmooth()`](https://inseefr.github.io/disaggR/reference/bflSmooth.md)
  : Smooth a time series
- [`distance()`](https://inseefr.github.io/disaggR/reference/distance.md)
  : Distance computation for disaggregations
- [`in_disaggr()`](https://inseefr.github.io/disaggR/reference/in_disaggr.md)
  : Comparing a disaggregation with the high-frequency input
- [`in_revisions()`](https://inseefr.github.io/disaggR/reference/in_revisions.md)
  : Comparing two disaggregations together
- [`in_sample()`](https://inseefr.github.io/disaggR/reference/in_sample.md)
  : Producing the in sample predictions of a prais-lm regression
- [`in_scatter()`](https://inseefr.github.io/disaggR/reference/in_scatter.md)
  : Comparing the inputs of a praislm regression
- [`plot(`*`<twoStepsBenchmark>`*`)`](https://inseefr.github.io/disaggR/reference/plot.tscomparison.md)
  [`plot(`*`<threeRuleSmooth>`*`)`](https://inseefr.github.io/disaggR/reference/plot.tscomparison.md)
  [`plot(`*`<tscomparison>`*`)`](https://inseefr.github.io/disaggR/reference/plot.tscomparison.md)
  [`autoplot(`*`<twoStepsBenchmark>`*`)`](https://inseefr.github.io/disaggR/reference/plot.tscomparison.md)
  [`autoplot(`*`<threeRuleSmooth>`*`)`](https://inseefr.github.io/disaggR/reference/plot.tscomparison.md)
  [`autoplot(`*`<tscomparison>`*`)`](https://inseefr.github.io/disaggR/reference/plot.tscomparison.md)
  : Plotting disaggR objects
- [`rePort()`](https://inseefr.github.io/disaggR/reference/rePort.md) :
  Producing a report
- [`reUseBenchmark()`](https://inseefr.github.io/disaggR/reference/reUseBenchmark.md)
  : Using an estimated benchmark model on another time series
- [`reView()`](https://inseefr.github.io/disaggR/reference/reView.md) :
  A shiny app to reView and modify twoStepsBenchmarks
- [`threeRuleSmooth()`](https://inseefr.github.io/disaggR/reference/threeRuleSmooth.md)
  : Bends a time series with a lower frequency one by smoothing their
  rate
- [`twoStepsBenchmark()`](https://inseefr.github.io/disaggR/reference/twoStepsBenchmark.md)
  [`annualBenchmark()`](https://inseefr.github.io/disaggR/reference/twoStepsBenchmark.md)
  : Regress and bends a time series with a lower frequency one
